title: SpanSaver · Agent Ops
description: LLM/agent observability for askdocs, mined from gen_ai spans (Traceloop/OpenLLMetry). Tokens, calls, prompt-size distribution, cacheable duplicates, cache reads, and cost drivers — the same signals the L1/L2 detectors act on. Queries use the CONFIRMED signoz_index_v3 columns and pinned gen_ai attribute keys (auditor/telemetry_auditor/schema.py + auditor/llm_auditor/attrs.py). Time-filter tokens follow SigNoz clickhouse-query templating; if this build rejects the import, rebuild panels from dashboards/README.md (same queries).

widgets.title: LLM tokens over time — askdocs
widgets.description: Input vs output tokens per interval. The L1 fix steps this down (repeats served from cache emit no span).

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL {{.step_interval}} SECOND) AS ts, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL {{.step_interval}} SECOND) AS ts, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: LLM calls / interval — askdocs
widgets.description: gen_ai span count. Cache hits (L1) don't call the model, so this drops after the fix.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL {{.step_interval}} SECOND) AS ts, count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Input tokens per request (p50 / p95)
widgets.description: Prompt-size distribution. L2 (prompt bloat) shows as a high p50; the fix collapses it toward the lean allowance.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL {{.step_interval}} SECOND) AS ts, quantile(0.5)(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL {{.step_interval}} SECOND) AS ts, quantile(0.95)(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Cache-read input tokens
widgets.description: gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens — nonzero once the L1 cache is doing work.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL {{.step_interval}} SECOND) AS ts, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

widgets.title: Total tokens (window)
widgets.description: All gen_ai input+output tokens for askdocs over the selected range.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'] + attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}}

widgets.title: Calls & tokens by model
widgets.description: Per-model call count and token totals — the cost driver breakdown.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT attributes_string['gen_ai.response.model'] AS model, count() AS calls, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']) AS input_tokens, sum(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) AS output_tokens FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY model ORDER BY calls DESC

widgets.title: Cacheable duplicate prompts (L1)
widgets.description: Prompt hashes answered more than once — repeats are pure waste an exact-match cache removes.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT cityHash64(attributes_string['gen_ai.input.messages']) AS prompt_hash, count() AS calls, count() - 1 AS repeats, round(avg(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'])) AS avg_input_tokens, round(avg(attributes_number['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens'])) AS avg_output_tokens FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE serviceName = 'askdocs' AND mapContains(attributes_string, 'gen_ai.input.messages') AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY prompt_hash HAVING calls >= 2 ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 20
